titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 141: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 141. (A.R. No. 102 of 1900.) TIRUVŌTTŪR, CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, Chidambarēśvara shrine, Vēdapurīśvara temple.

It records that a veḷḷāḷaṉ resident of Tiruvōttūr who was to supply ghee for burning one perpetual lamp to the god, Mahādēva of Tiruvōttūr, having taken over 100 sheep had defaulted. Consequently the lamps could not be burnt for a long time. The priest in charge of the sanctum (tiruvuṇṇāḻigai) in the ūr. Ilaṅkiḍāsāṉai Tirumēṟṟaḷipaḷḷikaṭṭil-ppiḍārar (priest of the temple of God Vishṇu) approached Viṭaṅkaṉ, the son of the above veḷḷāḷa and arranged for the lamp to be burnt. The lamp was named as Iḷaṅkiḍāsaṉai (after the above said priest). The shepherds of the Pāṭṭil agreed to supply the ghee to the body Iraṇḍutālai poṟkōyil kaikkōḷapperumpaḍaiyarkkuḍi.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. VII. No. 112.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟki yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu tiruvottūr mahaātevark
koru tirunan=tāviḷakkiṉ nūṟāṭṭukkum yivvūr veḷḷāḷaṉ pāmpuṇaip pāṭṭāṟ
kaṭavaṉā neyaṭṭāmaiyil viḷakku muṭṭip palavāṇṭu cella yivaṉ makaṉ viṭa
ṅkaṉai tuṭarntu yivviḷakku vaippittāṉ yivvūrt tiruvūṇṇāḻikaiyuṭaiya yi
ḷaṅ kiṭācāṉai tirumeṟṟaḷi paḷḷikaṭṭilppiṭāraṉ yivviḷakkiṉ per yiḷa
ṅkiṭācaṉai yitdharmma (m) miraṇṭutalai poṟkoyil kaikkoḷap perumpaṭaiyarkkuṭi
cam Aḷantu kuṭuppomāṉo mippāṭṭil maṉṟāṭika(ḷ)ḷom yiviḷak keṟṟa viṇṇa
ppañ ceytu yivviḷak yiḷaṅkiṭācāṉai tirumeṟṟaḷi paḷḷikaṭṭil piṭāraṉ .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
